event: Gamrat and Stanczyk in a Polish Court Scene
description: A dramatic nocturnal scene set in a snow-covered courtyard of a large medieval or Renaissance Polish building. A grand staircase leads up to the left. At center, a figure in white clerical or episcopal robes stands prominently, surrounded by other figures in dark clothing carrying torches and lanterns. A figure in distinctive dress — possibly a court jester — stands nearby. The buildings rise high in the background, their windows lit from within. Snow covers the ground and the rooftop of a wooden structure at right.
